title: Wilted Pillowy Mediterranean Brown Rice Noodle Bowl
description: A pungent, pillowy, sick-day Mediterranean dish featuring brown rice noodles, fermented jang, and a raw-friendly twist. Serve in a scallop shell vessel for a touch of whimsy.

ingredients.name: Fermented jang
ingredients.notes: use Korean chili paste or substitute with gochujang

ingredients.name: Dried oregano
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with thyme or rosemary

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add fermented jang and cook for 2 minutes, until slightly caramelized.
Add brown rice noodles and cook for 3-4 minutes, until wilted and coated in the sauce.
Season with salt, black pepper, and dried oregano.
Garnish with parsley and mint, if desired.
Serve immediately in scallop shells or bowls.
